subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta et al, spoken on 1920-01-12
subcodes.first_line: The owner of this house was a native of Beirut. He himself used to live here. When the government gave permission for us to leave the barracks we wanted to rent a house.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
